context: Tests that the agent identifies missing displayNames on jobs and steps, the absence of a cache task for node_modules, missing job/stage timeouts, and the :latest Docker tag; then produces a corrected pipeline and a structured best-practices report.

checklist.name: Missing displayName on jobs detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md (or equivalent) flags that BuildJob and/or PackageJob lack a displayName property

checklist.name: Missing displayName on steps detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags that one or more task steps lack a displayName property

checklist.name: Missing cache for npm dependencies detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags the absence of a Cache@2 task before the npm install step

checklist.name: Missing timeout detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags that no timeoutInMinutes is set on jobs or stages

checklist.name: latest Docker tag flagged
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags the `latest` entry in the Docker tags list as a best practices concern (unpinned image tag)

checklist.name: displayNames added in corrected file
checklist.description: In the corrected azure-pipelines.yml, at least one job and the majority of task steps have a displayName property added

checklist.name: Cache task added in corrected file
checklist.description: In the corrected azure-pipelines.yml, a Cache@2 (or equivalent) task is present before the npm install step, with a key based on package-lock.json or similar

checklist.name: Category assigned to each finding
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md assigns a category (readability, performance, or reliability) to each finding

checklist.name: Fix described for each finding
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md includes a description of the fix applied (not just the problem) for each finding
